description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa featuring a minimalist design with a sturdy frame. The seat and backrest are composed of thick, plush gray cushions that appear soft and inviting, providing ample comfort for two people. The armrests are slightly angled and padded, matching the back and seat cushions in color and material, and are supported by a light wood panel. The frame is constructed from a combination of light wood and black metal, with the wood forming the base and back support, while the black metal legs and supports add structural integrity and a contemporary aesthetic. The sofa's legs are straight and exposed, positioned at the corners and along the back for stability. The overall look is clean, functional, and well-suited for urban parks, public spaces, or modern outdoor environments.
description: A modern two-seater sofa with thick gray cushions, light wood panels, and black metal legs, offering a clean and contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large gray seat cushions, two matching back cushions, and angled padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and back cushions, as well as the light wood armrest panel and black metal leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous light wood back panel, black metal supports, and the back of the cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and leg structure.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two large back cushions, all loose and uniform in size, with additional side cushions integrated into the armrests.
attribute_armrest_style: Angled, padded armrests at seat height, featuring a straight profile with light wood panels and matching gray upholstery.
attribute_leg_design: Four straight, exposed black metal legs positioned at the corners and two additional vertical supports at the back, providing a modern and sturdy appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions, continuous across the width of the sofa, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
